cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Kali Devi ji, main Indian Overseas Bank se bol raha hoon.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Kaun? Kya chahiye? Thik hai, jaldi bolo.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Aapko ek investment scheme ke bare mein bata raha hoon. Guaranteed high returns hain.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Guaranteed? Kya hai yeh? Bank walon ka kaam hai kya yeh?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, sir. Yeh humare bank ka ek scheme hai. Aapko UPI se paise transfer karne honge.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: UPI? Kya pagal ho gaye ho? Main kabhi bhi aisa nahi karungi.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, sir. Toh main aapko account number do deta hoon. Aap NEFT se bhi paise transfer kar sakti hain.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 36s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Investment Scam: Agent from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank offers a "guaranteed" high-return mutual fund or stock investment scheme and pressures for immediate fund transfer via UPI/NEFT to a specific account.
